name: She Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add the leek slices and celery pieces; simmer until tender.
3. Mix flour, tomato paste, and oregano.
4. Stir well into the vegetables.
5. Gradually add chicken broth and fish stock, stirring continuously.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add crab roe, crabmeat, sherry, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper to the mixture; stir until combined.
8. Cook for 5 minutes only.
9. Remove from heat.
10. Stir in egg yolks and cream.
11. Serve immediately.
This traditional Southern recipe hails from Charleston, SC, with a history deeply rooted in New Orleans-style cooking. It has been carefully preserved by the original family of the restaurant that first created this dish and remains a closely guarded secret among culinary purists.
